title: Kernel lane: execution sidecar. Bootstrap only. Do not inspect the repository, docs, README, AGENTS, CODEX, or CI. Prepare alternative implementation paths once focus arrives. Remain available for follow-up.
summary_text: Bootstrap mode is active. I have not inspected any repository files, docs, or CI. Once you send focus, I can execute via one of these paths: 1. `Fast patch`: minimal diff, fix-only, lowest risk. 2. `Structured fix`: small refactor + tests for durability. 3. `Dual-path spike`: implement two candidate approaches, compare tradeoffs, keep one. Send a focus packet with: - target behavior/change - constraints (risk, scope, deadline) - preferred path (`1/2/3`) - any must-run validation commands Standing by for follow-up.
